title: bidens dilleniana
intro: Bidens dilleniana, also known as the hairy beggar-ticks, is a species of flowering plant in the aster family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bidens dilleniana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
